description_long: This is a single brown lace-up dress shoe with a woven texture pattern across the upper surface, giving it a sophisticated and breathable appearance. The shoe features a rounded toe and a low, flat heel, typical of formal or semi-formal footwear. The laces are thin and match the color of the shoe, threaded through four pairs of eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The side profile reveals a smooth, continuous sole and a slightly raised heel for added comfort and style. The back of the shoe is plain, with a seamless heel counter and no visible branding or embellishments. The overall finish is matte with a subtle sheen, and the shoe appears to be in excellent, unworn condition.
description: A brown lace-up dress shoe with a woven texture upper, rounded toe, and low heel, featuring a matte finish and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, woven texture, and neatly tied laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the woven pattern, low heel, and smooth sole profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain heel counter and seamless back construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the woven upper and continuous sole.
